output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P31 wd:Q2881502 ; wdt:P1545 wd:Q3063702 ; wdt:P585 ?year .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?year)
LIMIT 1
